message:
refactor(benchmark): Apply clippy suggestions for float comparisons

Addresses clippy lints in benchmark module:

- Use mul_add for fused multiply-add operations
- Use f64::from instead of casts
- Replace direct float equality with epsilon comparisons
- Use contains() for range checks instead of comparison operators

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
